_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With 0 of 42 windows showing ±2+ point moves, this is a textbook coil — HOLD is the statistically honest call until a breaker confirms either Panic leg down (fear_greed < 25, VIX > 75, funding < 30) or speculative recovery up (funding > 70, DXY < 50, stablecoin growth > 65).
next_move.brains_agree: No — analyst calls HOLD with medium conviction; narrative implies imminent bullish snapback. The split reflects narrative's pattern-match optimism vs analyst's structural skepticism, and the analyst's read is better supported by the diverging factors.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 with VIX spiking above 75 and funding collapsing below 30 — confirms Panic leg and potential Capitulation cascade toward true bottom
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC funding rises above 70 with DXY weakness breaking below 50 and stablecoin growth accelerating above 65 — signals speculative FOMO returning, invalidating bottom-comparison and shifting toward Complacency/Disbelief
